pi_items.source: Yahoo Finance, State Street Global Advisors documentation. SPY is the ticker symbol for the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, launched January 1993 as the first US ETF.

NinjaTrader 8 platform documentation and charting guides. Renko is a real chart type that focuses on price movement independent of time, with fixed-size 'bricks' representing specified price movements.

Renko trading guides and NinjaTrader 8 documentation. Typical brick sizes for SPY range from $20-$30 based on 1/20th of current price. A brick size of 2 is technically valid but represents an unusually granular setting for SPY.

NinjaTrader 8 documentation. EMA (Exponential Moving Average) and ADX (Average Directional Index) are both standard built-in indicators in NinjaTrader 8. EMA was developed as a trend-following indicator; ADX measures trend strength (developed 1978 by J. Welles Wilder).
NinjaTrader 8 official support forum and documentation. This is the standard path where NinjaTrader 8 stores workspace files on Windows. The specific username 'Docker' is environment-specific.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims reference real financial instruments, software features, and technical indicators. SPY is the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (the oldest and largest US ETF, launched 1993). Renko is a legitimate chart type in NinjaTrader 8 that displays price changes independent of time. EMA (Exponential Moving Average) and ADX (Average Directional Index) are standard built-in indicators in NinjaTrader 8. The brick size of 2 is technically valid but unusually granular for SPY (typical sizes are $20-$30). The workspace path follows NinjaTrader 8 conventions. The task uses real historical market data from Yahoo Finance for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT imported during environment setup.
